calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-14-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Mary Jane Gordon appearing for and with Paula Bibbs, special administrator. Alan Yee appearing for Vanessa Robison, objector. Mr. Yee objected to the amount of extraordianry fees requested. Both counsel presented oral arguments. Matter submitted.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Stella Obi.

Ex Parte Petition And Request For Court Instructions Regarding The Distribution Of The Proceeds From The Sale Of Decedent'S Real Property
Off Calendar Jul-24-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Mary Jane Gordon appearing for and with Special Administrator Paula Bibbs. Alan Yee appearing for Vanessa Robison. Mary Mayo appearing for Onesia Jackson. Issue on title of property addressed. Court ruled that the probate estate has 100% interest of the property. Court is not ruling on the settlement agreement. Mr. Yee argued that the Trust is not under court supervision. Onesia is to receive 60% and Vanessa is to receive 40% of the net estate after deductions for fees and costs. Court ordered the trustee to sign the escrow documents by 4 o'clock this afternoon. Order signed.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Aguerre.

Motion For Withdrawal Of Stipulation For Special Admin. To Remain As Admin. Of The Estate And For Appt. Of The Sole Distributees As Co-Administrators
Off Calendar Apr-24-2007 Continued To May-08-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Mary Jane Gordon appearing for and with special administrator Paula Bibbs. Mary Mayo appearing for Onesia Jackson. Alan Yee appearing for Vanessa Robison. The parties have agreed to keep the special administrator provided the realtor is removed and the parties will choose a new realtor to market the property. Ms. Gordon stated the listing agreement will expire on 5/2 and the parties can select the realtor at that time. Ms. Mayo wants an accounting. Ms. Gordon will submit an accounting prior 5/8. Matter is continued to 5/8.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Helen Soret-Matley CSR# 9225. Clerk: Ella Yip.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-03-2006 Continued To Aug-15-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Mary Mayo appearing for petitioner. Alan Yee appearing for contestant. Mediation was not successful. Parties are working among themself for settlement. If they cannot settle by 7/1, they will request for further mediation with another mediator in August. Matter is continued to 8/15 for status. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-22-2006 Continued To May-03-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Mary Mayo appearing for petitioner. Mary Jane Gordon appearing for and with Paula Bibbs, the special administrator. Alan Yee appearing for contestant. Court is encourging parties to mediate. Ms. Mayo's client did not want to mediate. Court is ordering this matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed by 4/25. Status conference is set on 5/3. If it is not settle, Court will set it for trial. Ms. Gordon raised the property title issue. Court wants parties to resolve the title issue. Ms. Bibbs to remain as the special administrator. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
